column1: # Sweep agx_s30 — AGX baseline variance × 3 seeds (2026-04-22)
# PURPOSE: establish AGX seed σ at our standard config. We have ONE data point
# per AGX config (s29) — cannot trust any AGX conclusion without σ estimate.
# Also: checkpoint archival now ON, so these become candidates for cross-machine soup.
# Baseline config matches Spark s32 (validated strong config).
